ab: Samanan iso a tayni.
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: Rakat sanay kako a tayni.
en: I came on foot.

ab: O maan a tosiyaan ko pikalican iso a tayni.
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: Mikalicay kako to paso a tayni.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: Samaanen iso a tayra i kiwkay.
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: Pakalican niwama ako kako itosiya ta malahakelong kami a tayra.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: Tohatiniay samaanay ko katayra niira I pitilidan.
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: Mikalicay cingra to cieying a tosiya.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: Samaanan ni Ama: iso a tayra mi’aca to dateng.
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: Paka otofayay cingra a mi’aca to dateng.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: Samaanen iso a tayra i fotod.
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: Mikalic kako to tamina a tayra i fotod.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: Samanan ningra a tayra i fotod?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: Mikalicay cingra to hikoki a tayra i fotod.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: O maan ko pikalican ningra a tayra i takaw.
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: Mikalicay cingra to hacikayay a cinamalay a tayra i Takaw.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: Mikalicay cingra to kasoling a talaposong haw?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: Hayi, mikalicay cingra to kasoling a tala posong.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: O kasoling ko pikalican niira a talaposong haw.
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: Cowa, o hikoki ko mikalican niira a talapong.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: Itini i ngata iray ko pikalican to paso haw?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: Iraay, rakaten tala’ayaw ma’arawto kopi talaan to paso.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: I cowaay ko mingataay to pikalican to cieying a Paliding.
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: Away i tini ko pitalaan to cieying. deng o haya kopi Kalican iso a tayra.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: Ano o paso ko pikalican hakowa ko halafin a tayra i pitilidan.
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: Lima ko safaw a efen no toki tahira i pitilidan.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: Ano fesiwpas ko pikalican hakowa ko halafin tahira i tayciw.
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: Cecay a tatokian tahirato i tayciw.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: Cecay a tatokian tahirato i tayciw.
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: Ma^deng cecay a tatokian.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: Hakowaay ko halafin iso a mikalic to cieying a tayni i loma’ ako.
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: Tosa polo’ a fen no toki.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: Mafana’ay kiso a mitingsa haw?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: Mafana’ay kiso a koliciw haw?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: Mafana’ay kako a mitingsa.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: Mafana’ay kako a koliciw.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: Iraay ko otofay iso haw?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: Iraay ko cecay a otofay ako.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: Iraay ko otofay iso haw?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: Away ko otofay ako.
en: B: I don’t have a motorcycle.
